use_cases: Displaying user profile information with professional bio and contact options
Showcasing developer or designer portfolios on personal websites
Creating team member showcase sections on company about pages
Building social network-style user cards in community platforms
Adding branded profile sections to SaaS dashboard interfaces
ai_summary: A glassmorphism-styled profile card component featuring avatar display, name, professional title, bio text, social media links with icons, and a call-to-action contact button. The component uses frosted glass effects with backdrop blur and semi-transparent backgrounds, optimized for responsive layouts across desktop and mobile platforms.
